modules_directory.hint: Path to the directory containing compiled C# module DLLs. Relative paths are relative to the plugin directory.

command_prefix.hint: The AstrBot command prefix for the Horizon Bot gateway. Commands will be /hb <module_command>

admins.description: Admin users (sender names) who can use admin commands like /hb_reload and /hb_list
admins.hint: List of user names or IDs who can use admin commands.
